spec_match.rationale: Removal feature — page covers one slice (probe / migration / note) but the spec's full removal+replacement story is split across multiple concepts; this page can't carry it alone.

interactive.rationale: 1 buttons / 1 inputs / 1 selects / 0 ranges driving live JS — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates the feature-index blurb's key promise (overlap on auction, bidders, contextual, device).

edge_cases.rationale: Demo runs the happy path; no visible feature detection, error handling, or no-support fallback in the script.

references.rationale: Page includes the chromestatus.com/feature/6552486106234880 link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: All colours come from the shared CSS variables and the layout follows the stage + controls editorial pattern.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: what contextual-only ad serving looks like
openQuestions.detail: The deprecate-and-remove-protected-audience feature's headline framing — Protected Audience / FLEDGE removal — joinAdInterestGroup and runAdAuction stop working — calls out "what contextual-only ad serving looks like". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: showing concrete usage that breaks
openQuestions.detail: The deprecate-and-remove-protected-audience feature's headline framing — Protected Audience / FLEDGE removal — joinAdInterestGroup and runAdAuction stop working — calls out "showing concrete usage that breaks". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Cover at least one realistic failure mode
openQuestions.detail: Add feature detection at the top of the script and surface the result. Handle the permission-denied / API-rejection case in the catch branch with a visible message. If the feature is flag-gated or origin-trial, show explicitly what the page does when the API is absent.

summary: auction-replay under deprecate-and-remove-protected-audience: 4 pass / 2 partial / 0 fail. Strong interactive surface, design system clean, spec story is partial — see open questions for the angles still missing.
